tagline: Santa Rosa tree work, 40+ years in Sonoma County
seoDescription: Discount Tree Service — owner Joe Pacheco has provided tree trimming, pruning, removals and stump grinding across Sonoma County for more than 40 years, serving Santa Rosa, Windsor, Sonoma, Healdsburg, Sebastopol and beyond.
heroHeading: Sonoma County tree work, more than 40 years strong
heroSubheading: Discount Tree Service is Joe Pacheco's Santa Rosa tree company — a small, local crew that has trimmed, pruned and removed trees across Sonoma County for over 40 years, at competitive prices.
aboutBody: Discount Tree Service is a small, local tree company run by owner Joe Pacheco, who has lived in the Santa Rosa area his whole life and worked Sonoma County's trees for more than 40 years. The crew serves Santa Rosa, Kenwood, Sonoma, Windsor, Rohnert Park, Glen Ellen, Penngrove, Healdsburg and Sebastopol.

The company specializes in shaping, pruning, removals, view clearance, dead-wood removal and tree cleaning, along with stump grinding — quality tree work at competitive prices. Neighbors have given Discount Tree Service 22 Faves on Nextdoor, with reviewers noting Joe's careful coordination and tidy clean-up.

services.title: Tree Trimming & Pruning
services.description: Shaping, safety pruning and dead-wood removal to keep your trees healthy and your property safe.

services.title: Tree Removal
services.description: Removal of hazardous, dead or overgrown trees, including trees overhanging neighboring properties.

services.title: View Clearance
services.description: Selective trimming and clearing to open up and protect your views.

services.title: Stump Grinding & Clean-Up
services.description: Stump grinding and thorough clean-up so the job is finished and your yard left tidy.

testimonials.quote: The tree hung over 3 properties and Joe even helped coordinate with the neighbors to get the job done.
testimonials.author: Verified Yelp review · Santa Rosa

notes: Sources: Yelp (17 reviews, 58 photos), Nextdoor (22 Faves), Houzz, Dun & Bradstreet, Manta, Sonoma County Gazette/Press Democrat directory. Website status: NO website (Yelp / Nextdoor / directory listings only) — strong target. Owner Joe (Joseph E.) Pacheco; 40+ years in business (exact founding year unconfirmed -> 'established' left empty). Phone (707) 236-7649. Service area listed above; mailing area Santa Rosa 95409. TRUST SIGNAL = verified Nextdoor 22 Faves + 17 Yelp reviews + a genuine attributed review quote (social proof, since no CSLB license could be verified to this business). CAUTION applied: an early search result wrongly tied CSLB #784518 to Discount Tree — that # actually belongs to Fitch Mountain Tree Service, so I deliberately did NOT claim a license here. Testimonial is a real review quote surfaced via search snippets (Yelp 403 in this env).
